headline: A Look At AMD (AMD) Valuation After A Powerful Multi‑Period Share Price Run
summary: Recent performance snapshot for Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) has attracted fresh attention after a strong run in its shares, with the stock showing gains over the past week, month and past 3 months, drawing investors back to the semiconductor name. At a recent close of US$354.49 and a 1 day return of about 5%, AMD stands well above its past month and past 3 months performance. Its 1 year and multi year total returns sit at very large multiples of the starting...

headline: AI Chips Today - Next-Gen Chips Drive Spatial Intelligence Forward
summary: Mosaic SoC, a semiconductor startup, has raised $3.8 million in a pre-seed funding round to support the development of its next-generation perception chips that aim to enhance real-time spatial intelligence in consumer devices. The company's chips are designed to process visual and positional sensor data efficiently, enabling devices to understand their environment in real-time with minimal power consumption. This innovation targets the growing demand for spatially aware devices like AR...

The company's chips are designed to process visual and positional sensor data efficiently, enabling devices to understand their environment in real-time with minimal power consumption. headline: Got 1,000 To Invest? Nvidia vs AMD- Only One Deserves Your Money
summary: NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA) and AMD (NASDAQ:AMD) closed the books on blockbuster quarters. NVIDIA posted $68.13 billion in Q4 FY2026 revenue on 73.21% growth. AMD followed with $10.27B and 34.1% YoY. Both ride the same AI wave, yet their businesses, margins, and customer mix tell very different stories. Blackwell Prints Cash. AMD Builds Breadth. headline: Nasdaq Composite Takes Off as Tech Bulls Retake Control on Strong Earnings, M&A
summary: The Nasdaq Composite (NASDAQ: ^IXIC) heads into May with record-setting momentum, closing April with a 15% monthly gain, its biggest since April 2020. Thursday’s nearly 1% advance capped the run, and after-the-bell earnings from Apple and SanDisk are the biggest forces shaping today’s open.
